title: Install clone prerequisites
command: apt-get update && apt-get install -y git curl ca-certificates
notes: Required before cloning the repository.

title: Install Node.js 22
command: curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | sudo -E bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs
notes: Required before frontend build and nginx deployment.

title: Clone repository
notes: Clone the validated repository before continuing.

title: Create backend env
command:
cat > backend/.env <<'EOF'
BACKEND_ADDR=:3001
PUBLIC_SERVER_URL=http://YOUR_SERVER_IP
FRONTEND_ORIGIN=http://YOUR_SERVER_IP
DEFAULT_ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@zerodha.com
DEFAULT_ADMIN_NAME=ITMS Admin
SALT_MASTER_HOST=YOUR_SERVER_IP
WAZUH_MANAGER_HOST=YOUR_SERVER_IP
EOF
notes: Replace YOUR_SERVER_IP with the new server IP or public host value.

title: Create backend secrets
notes: Passwords must satisfy ITMS password policy: 12+ chars, upper, lower, number, symbol.

title: Install Docker and start backend
notes: Installs Docker Engine and starts backend plus Postgres.

title: Verify backend stack
notes: Confirms Docker containers and API health.

title: Deploy nginx frontend
notes: Use the public IP or domain that nginx should serve.

title: Smoke test nginx
notes: Confirms login page and proxied API health.

title: Install Salt Wazuh OpenSCAP
notes: Installs host-side integrations and writes backend env values.

title: Recreate backend
notes: Reloads integration configuration into the backend container.

title: Install ClamAV
command: apt-get update && apt-get install -y clamav clamav-daemon || true
notes: Needed for full security verification.

title: Run API smoke test
notes: Validates core application endpoints and optional feature handling.

title: Run security verification
notes: Validates Salt Wazuh ClamAV and OpenSCAP on the host.

title: Open application
notes: Log in with admin@zerodha.com and the DEFAULT_ADMIN_PASSWORD value used at first startup.

title: Reset admin password if DB already existed
notes: Use only when env password changed after the database was initialized.

title: Test admin login by API
notes: \"password\":\"YOUR_STRONG_ADMIN_PASSWORD\"}'"
column8: Successful response returns a JWT token and super_admin user payload.
